title: Dendrium buxifolium
taxonomy: Dendrium buxifolium is classified as a species of flowering plant, specifically within the family Celastraceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is a member of the genus Dendrium. The classification of Dendrium buxifolium is further categorized as a deciduous shrub, native to the Himalayan foothills of India, Nepal, and Bhutan. This species is a part of the plant kingdom, belonging to the division Magnoliophyta and class Magnoliopsida. The Celastraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family.
